expect.note: gazelle_cc should emit cc_library targets from the include graph; proving structure even if build fails. Not a test query.

Neovim's own unit/functional tests are Lua (busted) and Lua-bridge C tests driven by CMake/luajit, not native cc_test rules; gazelle_cc will not generate test targets. No native Bazel tests exist in this scope, so tier-3 test discovery is informational only.

No native cc_test targets in scope (tests are Lua/busted run outside Bazel, and require generated headers + bundled deps libuv/luajit/treesitter that this source-native attempt does not model). Tier-4 cannot be honestly earned; informational only.
